content: Enabling {{organizationName}} AI will make {{organizationName}}-provided AI models available to all {{productName}} users.

comment.text: This text explains that enabling AI tools will make AI models provided by the organization accessible to all users of the product. It appears in a dialog or informational section related to AI tools within the services settings, likely to inform users about the benefits of enabling this feature. Translators should ensure the explanation of AI model availability is clear and accurate.
